text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 129 

GAP_INPP_COPAY_1M 

LABEL: Gap In-Network Preferred Pharmacy Copay for 1-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a 1-month supply of the drugs on this 
tier, using an in-network preferred pharmacy (INPP; also known as a preferred pharmacy within a split 
network) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME:
